comments.comment: 2013 was the first year a change in alloy with less zinc content due to a product change made part way through 2012 had it's full effect on releases of zinc and it's compounds.
Need updates.

Piston alloy is no longer used.  A new alloy, Silafont 36, contains less copper than the piston alloy.  However, the plant is not yet set up to remelt more than minimal Silafont 36 in-house; therefore, significantly more scrap was sent off-site for recycling.

Piston alloy is no longer used.  A new alloy, Silafont 36, contains less zinc than the piston alloy.  However, the plant is not yet set up to remelt more than minimal Silafont 36 in-house; therefore, significantly more scrap was sent off-site for recycling.
